stemHtml: The radar controller transmits the following traffic information to you:”FOXTROT ALPHA GOLF DELTA ZULU, TRAFFIC TWO O’CLOCK EIGHT MILES, CLOSING,SAME LEVEL.” What would be an appropriate reply?

options.a: "FOXTROT ALPHA GOLF DELTA ZULU, REQUEST LEAVE HEADING."
options.b: "NEGATIVE CONTACT, REQUEST VECTORS, FOXTROT ALPHA GOLF DELTA ZULU."
options.c: "ACKNOWLEDGED, WE ARE LOOKING, FOXTROT APLHA GOLF DELTA ZULU."
options.d: "FOXTROT APLHA GOLF DELTA ZULU, REPORT HEADING."
